ogTitle: Hastings Point vs Hat Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Hastings Point and Hat Head.
heading: Hastings Point vs Hat Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Hastings Point, New South Wales and Hat Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hastings Point has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Hat Head (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Hastings Point or Hat Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Hastings Point has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Hat Head scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Hastings Point scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Hat Head scores 49/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Hastings Point or Hat Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hastings Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
